versions.version_description: Simple chord arrangement,best played on electric guitar with Classic Chorus,alternatively acoustic can be used to give the tune a Folk style feel.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

recommended.song_name: Are You Gonna Be My Girl
This Is How We Do It
